title: Mobile App Needs To Function Like Desktop
excerpt: Hello, one of my biggest issues with the mobile app is I cannot comment on individual files like I can in the desktop. When I open a photo on the mobile app there’s no section were I can comment on that particular file. …

posts.author: SugarCayne (SugarCayne)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, one of my biggest issues with the mobile app is I cannot comment on individual files like I can in the desktop. When I open a photo on the mobile app there’s no section were I can comment on that particular file. It’s a big issue in my opinion. A simple yet vital feature that every free platform has really needs to be upgraded to work in Monday. I’m surprised it hasn’t already. My team is in desperate need for a feature like this to work on mobile.

Also the custom item color feature doesn’t work on the mobile app. That needs to be correct asap.
